description: Machine-readable registry of all doctrine files. Auditor and certification validator read this registry to verify doctrine compliance. Single source of truth for doctrine file inventory.

doctrine_files.scope: CTB topology, CC hierarchy, hub-spoke geometry, IMO flow, descent gates, PID doctrine, ownership constraints
Registry-first enforcement, cardinality rules, defense-in-depth, batch-level RAW lockdown, vendor JSON containment, bootstrap enforcement
Fail-closed CI contract, Gates A-E, bootstrap guarantees, no continue-on-error
Valid execution surfaces, prohibited directories, forbidden folders, enforcement detection
6-step rollback procedure for doctrine sync failures, version pinning, ADR escalation
5-phase legacy migration protocol from ungoverned to CTB-governed
Tool registration doctrine, hub-scoped ownership, determinism-first, LLM-as-tail
Operational semantic access map, query routing, stop conditions, registry-first enforcement
Garage control plane boundaries, car exclusion rules, governance centralization, agent ownership

constitutional_surfaces.scope: Transformation law, design declaration requirement, governance direction, violation enforcement
CTB backbone primitives, altitude hierarchy, architectural elevation triggers
Agent role isolation, artifact flow model, pressure test bus enforcement, human sovereign authority
Protected models, protected folders, child repo inherited protection, elevation rules
